overview: The design contains a single independent service with no dependencies, so a single-phase plan is sufficient. The todo-api is built directly as the foundation and sole component.

phases.name: Foundation Service
phases.description: Implement the standalone todo REST API service. It has no dependencies and provides all required functionality.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Expose REST endpoints for listing, creating, and deleting todos
Maintain thread-safe in-memory storage of todo items
Validate input and return structured JSON error responses
Provide a health check endpoint and request logging middleware
Generate unique, non-reused identifiers for todos
components.architectureContext: Standalone HTTP service on port 9090 serving JSON clients directly. No upstream or downstream service dependencies; acts as the complete backend for todo management.
keyConsiderations: Use sync.RWMutex around the in-memory map for concurrent create/delete safety
Generate IDs via crypto/rand or google/uuid and track to prevent reuse
Sort GET /todos by created_at descending; return [] when empty
Trim and validate title; reject empty/whitespace with 400 JSON error
Multi-stage Dockerfile (golang:1.22 → distroless/static) exposing 9090; never leak internal errors
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: /
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status: {type: string}
  /todos:
    get:
      summary: List todos
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Array of todos
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
    post:
      summary: Create todo
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TodoCreate'}
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
        '400':
          description: Validation error
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
  /todos/{id}:
    delete:
      summary: Delete todo
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
        '404':
          description: Not found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
components:
  schemas:
    Todo:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string}
        title: {type: string}
        description: {type: string}
        done: {type: boolean}
        created_at: {type: string, format: date-time}
    TodoCreate:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title: {type: string}
        description: {type: string}
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        error: {type: string}
